problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
